title: The Silver Wealth Tsunami: How ‘Tech Meets Touch’ is Unlocking Japan’s Trillion-Dollar Aging Crisis
tags: Cross Finance Future Tech;MILIZE Introduces Life Plan Simulation Function to Chiba Bank’s “Chibagin App”MILIZE announces the introduction of a life plan simulation function developed by the company into the “Chibagin App,” a smartphone application provided by The Chiba Bank. Background of Implementation In recent years, personal life planning has become an increasingly important issue due to rapid social changes and the increasing complexityJapan FinTech ObserverNorbert Gehrke
